mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hearing_answers (student_id, hearing_item_id, answer, answered_at) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{hearingItemId}, #{answer}, #{answeredAt}) ON CONFLICT (student_id, hearing_item_id) DO UPDATE SET answer = EXCLUDED.answer, answered_at = EXCLUDED.answered_at, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT ha.hearing_item_id AS hearingItemId, hi.name AS itemName, ha.answer, ha.answered_at AS answeredAt FROM hearing_answers ha INNER JOIN hearing_items hi ON ha.hearing_item_id = hi.id WHERE ha.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY hi.display_order ASC, hi.id ASC
